user.title: KKT Kolbe Integration Setup
user.description:
Choose your setup method for KKT Kolbe devices.

**Recommended:** SmartLife (no developer account required)

smartlife_check_existing.title: SmartLife Account
smartlife_check_existing.description:
Found {account_count} existing SmartLife account(s).

You can use an existing account to add more devices without re-authenticating, or create a new account.

data_description.account_choice: Choose an existing account or create a new one

smartlife_user_code.title: SmartLife User Code
smartlife_user_code.description:
Enter your SmartLife/Tuya Smart App User Code.

**How to find your User Code:**
1. Open the SmartLife or Tuya Smart App
2. Go to **Profile** (bottom right)
3. Tap the **Settings** icon (top right)
4. Select **Account and Security**
5. Find your **User Code** at the bottom

**Note:** Works with both SmartLife and Tuya Smart apps - the correct schema is auto-detected.

data_description.user_code: Your User Code from the SmartLife/Tuya Smart App (found in Profile > Settings > Account and Security)

smartlife_scan.title: Scan QR Code
smartlife_scan.description:
Scan this QR code with your SmartLife or Tuya Smart App:

**Instructions:**
1. Open the SmartLife/Tuya Smart App
2. Tap **Profile** (bottom right)
3. Tap the **Scan** icon (top right)
4. Scan the QR code above
5. **Confirm the login** in the app
6. Click **Submit** below

smartlife_scan_timeout.title: Scan Timeout
smartlife_scan_timeout.description:
The QR code scan timed out. This can happen if:
- The QR code was not scanned in time
- The login was not confirmed in the app

Would you like to try again?

data_description.retry: Generate a new QR code and try scanning again
data_description.back: Go back to enter a different User Code

smartlife_scan_failed.title: Authentication Failed
smartlife_scan_failed.description:
The SmartLife authentication failed. This can happen if:
- The wrong User Code was entered
- The QR code scan was cancelled
- There was a network error

Would you like to try again?

data_description.retry: Generate a new QR code and try again
data_description.back: Go back to enter a different User Code

smartlife_select_devices.title: Select Device
smartlife_select_devices.description:
Found {kkt_device_count} KKT Kolbe device(s) in your SmartLife account.

{account_info}

Select the device you want to add to Home Assistant.

**Important:** Only **one device** is added per setup. To add multiple devices, run this setup again for each additional device.

data.use_manual: Use manual device ID entry instead

data_description.selected_devices: Select the KKT Kolbe device to add (one device per setup)
data_description.use_manual: If your device is not listed, use manual configuration

smartlife_select_device_type.title: Select Device Type
smartlife_select_device_type.description:
The device **{device_name}** could not be automatically identified.

Please select the correct device type from the list below.

**Tip:** If your specific model is not listed, select 'Default Hood - Generic Range Hood' for basic functionality.

data_description.device_type: Select the model that matches your KKT Kolbe device

api_only.title: API-Only Setup
api_only.description: Configure your device using TinyTuya Cloud API only.

data_description.api_client_id: Access ID from your Tuya IoT Platform project
data_description.api_client_secret: Access Secret from your Tuya IoT Platform project

api_device_selection.title: Select Your Device
api_device_selection.description: Choose your KKT Kolbe device from the API discovery.

data_description.selected_device: Select your KKT Kolbe device from the discovered devices
data_description.retry_discovery: Retry device discovery with different API settings

api_choice.title: API Credentials
api_choice.description: Use stored API credentials or enter new ones.

data_description.use_stored_api: Use previously saved TinyTuya API credentials: {stored_api_info}
data_description.manage_api: Advanced: Clear or modify stored API credentials

api_credentials.title: New API Credentials
api_credentials.description: Enter new TinyTuya Cloud API credentials.

data_description.api_client_id: Access ID from your Tuya IoT Platform project
data_description.api_client_secret: Access Secret from your Tuya IoT Platform project

authentication.title: Device Authentication
authentication.description: Enter the local key for your KKT Kolbe device.

data_description.local_key: 16-character local encryption key from Smart Life app
data_description.test_connection: Test connection with the provided local key
data_description.back_to_previous: Return to device selection or manual configuration

confirmation.title: Setup Complete
confirmation.description: Your KKT Kolbe device has been successfully configured.

discovery.title: Device Discovery
discovery.description: Searching for KKT Kolbe devices on your network...

data_description.selected_device: Select your KKT Kolbe device from discovered devices
data_description.retry_discovery: Search again for devices on the network
data_description.use_manual_config: Configure device manually with IP and device ID

smart_discovery.title: Smart Discovery

data_description.back_to_user: Go back to choose a different setup method

zeroconf_confirm.title: Device Discovered!

zeroconf_authenticate.title: Device Discovered - Authentication Required

data_description.local_key: Enter the 16-character local key from the Smart Life app
data_description.configure_api: Use Tuya Cloud API to automatically fetch local keys for all devices

zeroconf_api_credentials.title: Configure Tuya Cloud API
zeroconf_api_credentials.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials to automatically fetch device keys.

**Device:** {device_name}
**Device ID:** {device_id}...

Get credentials from: [{tuya_iot_url}]({tuya_iot_url})

data_description.api_client_id: Access ID from your Tuya IoT Platform project
data_description.api_client_secret: Access Secret from your Tuya IoT Platform project

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description:
Enter your KKT Kolbe device details manually.

**Tip:** If your specific model is not listed, select 'Default Hood - Generic Range Hood' for basic range hood controls.

data_description.host: IP address of your KKT Kolbe device (e.g., 192.168.1.100)
data_description.device_id: 20-character device ID from Smart Life app
data_description.device_type: Select your specific model, or use 'Default Hood' if unknown

smartlife_reauth.title: SmartLife Re-authentication
smartlife_reauth.description:
Re-authenticate your SmartLife account for **{device_name}**.

Enter the User Code from your SmartLife/Tuya Smart App.

data_description.user_code: Your User Code from the SmartLife/Tuya Smart App

data_description.local_key: Enter new 16-character local key if device was reset
data_description.api_client_id: Updated Access ID from Tuya IoT Platform
data_description.api_client_secret: Updated Access Secret from Tuya IoT Platform
data_description.api_endpoint: Regional API endpoint for your account

reconfigure_connection.title: Connection Settings

data_description.ip_address: Device IP address on your network
data_description.local_key: 16-character encryption key (leave empty to keep current)
data_description.test_connection: Verify connection with device before saving

reconfigure_device_type.title: Device Type

data_description.device_type: Select the correct model for your device

reconfigure_api.title: API Settings

data_description.api_enabled: Enable hybrid mode with cloud API fallback
data_description.api_client_id: Access ID from Tuya IoT Platform
data_description.api_client_secret: Access Secret (leave empty to keep current)

data_description.local_key: Local key (leave empty to keep current)
data_description.api_client_secret: Tuya API Secret (leave empty to keep current)

settings.title: Device Settings
settings.description: Configure advanced settings for your KKT Kolbe device.

data_description.update_interval: How often to update device status (seconds)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to device. Check IP address and network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your local key.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.
error.invalid_device_id: Invalid device ID. Must be at least 20 characters.
error.invalid_local_key: Invalid local key. Must be 16 characters.
error.invalid_user_code: Invalid User Code. Please check the User Code in your SmartLife/Tuya Smart App.
error.api_connection_failed: Could not connect to Tuya Cloud API.
error.api_test_failed: Failed to connect to Tuya Cloud API. Please verify your credentials.
error.api_client_id_required: API Client ID is required when API is enabled.
error.api_client_id_invalid: API Client ID must be at least 10 characters.
error.api_client_secret_required: API Client Secret is required when API is enabled.
error.api_client_secret_invalid: API Client Secret must be at least 20 characters.
error.no_kkt_devices_found: No KKT Kolbe devices found in your SmartLife account.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device to add.

abort.already_in_progress: A setup flow for this device is already running. Please complete or dismiss the existing flow first.
abort.no_device_id: Could not identify device. No device ID found.
abort.no_local_key: No local key available. Please provide a local key or use API credentials to fetch it automatically.
abort.device_not_found: The selected device was not found. It may have been removed from your SmartLife account.
abort.no_devices_selected: No devices were selected. Please select at least one device to add.
abort.reauth_successful: Reauthentication successful. The integration has been reloaded.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Configuration updated successfully. The integration has been reloaded.
abort.smartlife_not_authenticated: SmartLife authentication was not completed. Please start the setup again.
abort.all_devices_configured: All KKT Kolbe devices in your SmartLife account are already configured.

init.title: KKT Kolbe Options
init.description: Configure options for your KKT Kolbe device.

data_description.new_local_key: Enter new local key if device was reset (16 characters, any format)
data_description.api_enabled: Enable TinyTuya Cloud API for hybrid mode and device discovery
data_description.api_client_id: Access ID from Tuya IoT Platform project
data_description.api_client_secret: Access Secret from Tuya IoT Platform project
data_description.disable_fan_auto_start: When turning on the light or power, prevent the fan from starting automatically (hood devices only)

renew_token.title: Renew SmartLife Token
renew_token.description:
Scan the QR code below with your SmartLife or Tuya Smart App to renew the authentication token for **{account_name}**.

![QR Code]({qr_code_url})

After scanning, click Submit.

smartlife_device.title: SmartLife Device Options
smartlife_device.description:
Configure options for **{device_name}**.
Current update interval: {current_interval}s

data_description.scan_interval: How often to update device status (10-300 seconds)
data_description.new_local_key: Enter new local key if device was reset (16 characters)
data_description.disable_fan_auto_start: Prevent fan from starting automatically when turning on light or power

device.title: Device Options
device.description:
Configure options for **{device_name}**.

error.invalid_local_key_length: Local key must be exactly 16 characters
error.local_key_test_failed: Failed to connect with new local key. Please verify the key is correct
error.api_client_id_required: API Client ID is required when API is enabled

error.api_client_secret_required: API Client Secret is required when API is enabled

parent_entry_missing.title: SmartLife Account Missing
parent_entry_missing.description:
The SmartLife account for device **{device_name}** was deleted or is missing.

The device cannot retrieve updated tokens without its parent account.

**To fix:** Remove this device and add it again using the SmartLife setup.

smartlife_token_expired.title: SmartLife Token Expired
smartlife_token_expired.description:
The SmartLife authentication token has expired.

**To fix:** Go to the integration settings and re-authenticate with SmartLife.

update_local_key.title: Enter New Local Key
update_local_key.description:
The local key for **{entry_title}** (Device: {device_id}) has expired or is incorrect.

Please enter the new 16-character encryption key.

data_description.local_key: The new 16-character encryption key from Tuya IoT Platform or SmartLife

error.invalid_local_key: Local key must be exactly 16 characters

confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tuya API
confirm.description:
The API credentials for **{entry_title}** are no longer valid.

Click Submit to start the re-authentication process.

confirm_region.title: Select Correct Region
confirm_region.description:
The API endpoint for **{entry_title}** appears to be incorrect (current: {current_endpoint}).

Please select the correct region for your Tuya account.

update_device.title: Update Device Information

data.local_key: Local Key (if not fetching from cloud)

data_description.ip_address: Current IP address of the device
data_description.fetch_from_cloud: Automatically fetch the local key from your SmartLife account
data_description.local_key: 16-character local key (only needed if not fetching from cloud)
